summary: Corpus: add Transcendental Magic (Lévi, trans. Waite 1896) — ingest, chunk, essay summary
description:
Add Éliphas Lévi's Dogme et Rituel de la Haute Magie in the A.E. Waite 1896 translation (Transcendental Magic: Its Doctrine and Ritual) to the corpus, tradition western_esoteric.

Source (verified 2026-07-14): Global Grey complete-text single HTML, https://www.globalgreyebooks.com/online-ebooks/eliphas-levi_transcendental-magic-its-doctrine-and-ritual_complete-text.html — HTTP 200 with browser UA, 760KB, h1 title + h2 'Volume One: Dogme'/'Volume Two: Rituel' + 47 h3 (Introduction + 22 chapters per volume, trailing 'Footnotes' h3). Waite text confirmed by opening line 'Behind the veil of all the hieratic and mystical allegories...'. NOT on sacred-texts (only Paradoxes of the Highest Science) or Gutenberg (no records).

License: public_domain — pre-1930 US publication; Waite d. 1942 so life+70 expired 2013 (UK/EU). Global Grey terms permit redistribution with their branding removed; ingest strips all GG markup/branding. Canonical scan for fidelity disputes: archive.org/details/transcendentalma00leviuoft (1896 Redway).

Milestone scope (this parent): manifest + acquire, chunking config + chunk, essay summary (dossier) stage. Deferred to later tickets: embed_corpus, tag_concepts, propose_edges, and any further new texts.

resolution.note: All children closed: manifest+acquire (101ccdd6), chunking 96+123 chunks with works-layer grouping (7f392512), extractor nesting bugfix found en route (89425b7b), campaign c2 plan + 29 pending L1 essay summaries (91b4c43b). Next actions live outside this parent: L1 review/accept then remaining dossier stages; embed/tag/edges deferred per scope.
